programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines! Emily really admires Caitlin, who shunts her to the castle when she breaks down
programme.desc: Later when Caitlin's brakes fail, Emily has a chance to save her hero.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The Pig family are going on holiday. Peppa and George pack their favourite toys and Granny and Grandpa are left to look after Goldie the Fish.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: ...Black Hole. When things go missing in Windsor Gardens Jonathan believes a black hole is to blame, so Paddington goes on a space mission.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy accidentally upset Zac while playing a scary storm game. They show him that storms aren't anything to be afraid of.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The patrol must retrieve a royal painting when Sweetie steals a painting of the Princess and replaces it with one of herself.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: ...House. It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George and Freddy Fox are mistaken for pirates while sailing on the river with Grandpa Pig, complete with costumes and a Jolly Roger flag.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is making a wicker basket. She explains it is her hobby - something you do to relax. The children discuss hobbies and learn about each other's favourite things to do.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Grumblestunk's new speed camera catches Stan breaking the speed limit on his scooter, but he can't have been! Stan and Gran have to clear his name.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: ...Flaming Flounder. Francois's pants catch on fire.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark embark on a hunt to find the long-lost treasure of Captain Cottonbeard. But Crafty Mr Croc is also after the treasure.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly and Ben spend a day at Lucy's school, but struggle to avoid being spotted by the teacher, Miss Cookie.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family go to the school fete. Peppa and George have their faces painted as tigers, and Daddy Pig makes a dinosaur out of a balloon.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Odo is thrilled to spend the day looking after Eaglet's pet snail, Freddy. Odo has always wanted a pet and if he can prove he's a good snail-carer, maybe he can have his own pet.

programme.title: Milkshake! Make a Change
programme.desc: Derek learns about different kinds of wildlife in our environment, from birds and bugs to butterflies. At Forest School, children learn how birdwatching can help us understand wildlife.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: A story about two friends who are total opposites. Soft's fluff always gets up Sticky's nose, and Sticky sticks like glue to Soft! Despite their differences, can they stay friends.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Beckett is forced to swap her uniform for a ball gown in order to track a thief who is targeting New York's elite.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett probe the case of a woman found drowned in motor oil in a motel bathtub by tracking down a crime journalist who knew the victim.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Red Kites were once a thriving species in Northern Ireland but due to disruption of their precious habitats, the bird went extinct. But conservationists have reintroduced the species.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: We discover how even in our inner cities, bird watching is something any of us can do, as we follow The Urban Birder, David Lindo.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: In historic Nottinghamshire, Susan hears tales of superheroes, flexes her fingers at archery, explores mysterious caves, and walks in the footsteps of ice skaters Torvill and Dean.

programme.title: Springtime on the Farm
programme.desc: We visit a dairy farm where tradition and technology combine as cows choose when to be milked, guided by smart collars. And Rob and Dave consider investing in a Highland heifer.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: John arrives with a head injury after falling from a ladder, three-year old Leo has a burnt hand, and Ken is rushed in by ambulance after a serious car crash.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi heads to the Malvern Hills, Worcestershire to face one of her toughest challenges: a 24-year-old landlord who's never worked behind a bar in his life and out of his depth.

programme.title: Snatched
programme.desc: In 1999, schoolgirls Charlene Lunnon and Lisa Hoodless vanished, sparking one of the UK's largest missing persons searches. But unknown to the police, they were being held captive in Eastbourne.

programme.title: My Boyfriend Made Me Do It
programme.desc: How Sofia faced two years in a Dubai jail after her boyfriend ripped her off. And the story of two teenagers who were sentenced to a total of 43 years in a notorious Bangkok prison.

programme.title: Murder 360
programme.desc: Micah Rine's close-knit, God-fearing family have a bad feeling about her new husband. Thomas Pate has a troubled past. And when Micah goes missing, he begins to act suspiciously.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Leicestershire, treasure-hunting with Liz, Keith and Emma.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Transport for London investigators Rich and Greg are on the trail of a man they believe has run up over £1500 in unpaid fares in east London on the Elizabeth Line.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: While Phoebe delivers triplets, Joey experiences his own pain. Monica plans a date with a male nurse to spite Chandler.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Monica gets upset when Chandler gloats about sex. Ross has a tough decision to make.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: In Harrogate Paul and David Elstob find items to flip for profit at auction. With little time and a limited budget, will they find hidden treasures? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups build a nature box and try to find someone to live in their home. But when their new friend doesn't want to live in the box, can they find another way to make it happy? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When Redbeard, captaining his 'unsinkable' boat, hits a rock he calls on the services of Elf Rescue! (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family arrive in Italy. Everyone is talking in a different language and Daddy Pig finds driving on the right a little difficult.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On the first day in their holiday villa, Peppa and her family go exploring in the local village.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Tweedy sets out to paint the perfect picture of Fluff but Fluff's cooperation can't be depended on. Can Tweedy adapt his perfect portrait to his imperfect and unpredictable pet.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: Scratch shares her love of building blocks with Magnus and Squiggle. Squiggle realises sometimes fun isn't just about building towers, but also about when they come toppling down.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines! An energetic little diesel boxcab named Philip arrives at Knapford and challenges Gordon to a race
Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Charlie and Bronwyn take the kids on a sailing lesson, but Charlie feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. Trying to win back the kids' attention, Charlie ends up sinking the boat.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Simi and Paddington try to find the gold at the end of rainbow after they break Baaz's Kaleidoscope.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Posy is headed to Pip's house for lunch but on the way, she fills up on snacks. Unknown to her, Pip has prepared a feast.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger gets them all in trouble.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig get stuck behind Mrs Badger's tractor on the way to her farm, where Peppa and George learn about how useful tractors can be, even if they aren't very fast.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pig's house. They find Mummy's old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides she'd like to make one for the baby.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan and Gran get the giggles while spotting nature on the Ley, and the lake seems to be giggling back at them! Who is that laughing.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Alex's costume gets him carried off by seagulls.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark become sculptors and are commissioned to create a sculpture of Rodney Rhino. They try to sculpt with different materials but can't 'find' Rodney in any of them.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The children adopt a new pet - a dragon named Dave. They didn't know that he was going to grow and grow though... Wherever can they keep him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George and Daddy Pig prepare a wonderful birthday surprise for Mummy Pig.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: It's time for the yearly Apple Festival, but everything is going wrong and Reggie the fox gets the blame. Will Odo be able to prove that his furry friend is innocent.

programme.title: Milkshake! Make a Change
programme.desc: Milkshake! presenter Derek explores why water matters to our environment. At Forest School, children play with a water chute as Derek explains how saving water can make a difference.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: A story about Pip, Posy and friends playing games on a sunny day. Everybody wants to win, and they soon start to feel grumpy when they don't. Will the friends learn to play as a team.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: An FBI agent arrives to help with a kidnapping case. When he discovers the FBI agent is Beckett's ex boyfriend, Castle gets involved too.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: While investigating the brutal murder of a plastic surgeon, Castle and Beckett threaten to upend a federal case in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Eryri National Park in North Wales has been designated one of only a handful of International Dark Sky Reserves on earth. As one world sleeps, another awakens.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: Rewilding Coombeshead is a 400 acre site aiming to recover everything from the European wildcat to water voles and beavers.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.sub-title: Susan, in her camper van Helen, explores the rugged Ilkley Moor, the charming village of Upperthong; and Holmfirth
programme.desc: the setting of record-breaking sitcom Last of the Summer Wine.

programme.title: Springtime on the Farm
programme.sub-title: Jules Hudson helps deliver a set of twin lambs; Helen Skelton meets Cannon Hall Farm's newest piglets; while Rob and Dave Nicholson release their reindeer into a woodland paddock

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire cops crack down on motorists over the limit, including the driver of a runaway car admitting to being high on ketamine and a van man suspected of being drunk at the wheel.

programme.title: Pompeii: The Secret DNA
programme.desc: This documentary offers a stark new portrayal of the ancient city once thought of as a symbol of sophistication, exposing a deeply divided society marked by inequality, violence and unrest.

programme.title: Piers Morgan: Uncensored
programme.desc: The bold, opinion-led news and debate show hosted by Piers Morgan. Piers blends journalism, debates and cultural commentary that's unapologetically direct.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Aldi vs Lidl: Which Tastes Better?
programme.desc: Blind tastings reveal which of these budget supermarket titans has the best tasting products. Plus, how did they come from nowhere to become household names.

programme.title: GAIL's: Inside Britain's Poshest Bakery
programme.desc: With over 170 UK branches, GAIL's is growing at record pace. We look at the impact it's had on our tastes, and our appetite to pay more for posh pastries and luxury loaves.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross tells Rachel that he cannot be around her once Emily comes to New York. Chandler and Monica try to have a romantic weekend.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel meet a monster. Will Ross obey Emily and move away from his friends.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: ** Visually Signed** Paul Martin's Antiques Showdown
programme.desc: Paul and David Elstob must pick up a bonus big ticket item. But what will bidders prefer a pair of Victorian torcheres or 19th-century Windsor chairs? (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a Pirate Hunt, looking for golden treasure, but when they can't find any gold, will they end up empty handed? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly and Ben spend a day at Lucy's school, but struggle to avoid being spotted by the teacher, Miss Cookie. (VS).

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups wonder what it would be like to be superheroes, so they mix up an adventure to be real superheroes with real powers.

programme.title: PAWsome Puzzles
programme.desc: Help the PAW Patrol solve games, puzzles, and brainteasers in these mini-missions.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The carnival comes to town, and it's a chance to see all sorts of exciting things.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Peppa takes Goldie the Goldfish for a visit to the vets, she is surprised when she finds that there's a new road to be built over the building.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When Redbeard, captaining his 'unsinkable' boat, hits a rock he calls on the services of Elf Rescue.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends: All Engines Go!
programme.desc: A plucky tank engine is joined by his friends to maintain the railroads across their island home and embark on various missions and adventures.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Charlie is having a bad day, but gets a chance to be a hero when Tom is swept out to sea in a rubber dinghy in thick fog.
